metadata.notes: Research conducted via web search and curl WAF testing. WAF types confirmed by HTTP response headers.

AL.notes: Powered by Tyler Technologies AccessGov. Nginx server, no WAF detected. Corporations no longer required to file annual reports.

AK.notes: F5 BIG-IP load balancer (TS0 cookies). Portal at www.commerce.alaska.gov/cbp/main/. Business licenses at BusinessLicense.Alaska.Gov.

AZ.notes: NEW portal launched Jan 12, 2026 replacing eCorp. Called 'Arizona Business Center' / 'Arizona Business Connect'. Portal did not respond to curl - may require browser JS. Features File Tracker, QR code verification.

AR.portal_name: Arkansas Secretary of State Corporations Online Filing
AR.notes: Apache server, no WAF detected. Same-day recording for filings before 3 PM CST. Also has sos-ofs.ark.org for other filings.

CA.notes: Imperva Incapsula WAF (visid_incap cookies, x-iinfo header). Requires Okta account. Primary portal since April 2022. Handles Articles of Org, Statements of Information, name reservations.

CO.portal_name: Colorado Secretary of State Business Center
CO.notes: Cloudflare WAF (cf-ray header, __cf_bm cookie) + F5 BIG-IP (TS01 cookie). MyBizColorado is the branded portal. Java-based app (JSESSIONID).

CT.notes: Replaced old CONCORD system. No WAF detected in headers. Modern portal for all business and commercial filings.

DE.notes: F5 BIG-IP (TS017cb0e9 cookie). For formation docs: most filers use registered agents who submit via mail/courier. Online portal mainly for annual reports/taxes. Document upload service also available. Portal hours 8am-11:45pm ET.

DC.notes: Cloudflare WAF (cf-ray). Now under Dept of Licensing & Consumer Protection (formerly DCRA). New CorpOnline launched Dec 2025. Requires Access DC single sign-on account.

FL.notes: Cloudflare WAF with challenge (cf-mitigated: challenge, 403 response). Aggressive bot protection. Accepts Visa/MC/Amex/Discover or prepaid Sunbiz E-File Account. Annual reports due Jan 1 - May 1.

GA.notes: Cloudflare WAF with aggressive challenge (cf-mitigated: challenge, 403). Accepts Visa/MC/Amex/Discover. One-click annual registration available. Saves $10 vs paper filing.

HI.notes: AWS ELB (awselb/2.0 server header). No WAF detected. Under DCCA. Some forms still require paper submission. MyBusiness Alerts available.

ID.notes: Cloudflare WAF (cf-ray) but no challenge/block on basic request. Free online annual reports (paper = $20 fee). Uses Access Idaho payment processor.

IL.portal_name: Illinois Secretary of State Corporation & LLC Filing
IL.notes: Portal actively blocks curl/bots (HTTP/2 stream errors, connection resets). Likely aggressive WAF or bot detection. Requires browser with JavaScript. Entity search at apps.ilsos.gov/corporatellc/.

IN.notes: Microsoft IIS, no WAF detected. One-stop shop integrating SOS, Dept of Revenue, and Dept of Workforce Development. Biennial entity reports required.

IA.portal_name: Fast Track Filing (Iowa Secretary of State)
IA.notes: Akamai WAF (AkamaiGHost server, 403 on curl). Biennial reports can be filed without account. Over 500K docs processed. Filing reduces time from weeks to minutes.

KS.notes: AWS CloudFront CDN (not a WAF per se). Instant certified copy available upon online registration. ksbiz.kansas.gov is the main business portal.

KY.notes: Returns 403 on curl suggesting WAF/bot protection. Supports prepaid accounts. Certificate validation available online.

LA.notes: Microsoft IIS, no WAF detected. Joint portal with Dept of Revenue and Workforce Commission. Expedited options available. Same-day processing for most online filings. Training sessions offered.

ME.notes: Nginx server, no WAF detected. Some services require InforME subscription. Annual reports via charter number. UCC Online separate system.

MD.notes: No WAF detected. Award-winning portal. All online filings considered expedited. Under Dept of Assessments & Taxation (SDAT). Can form most Maryland businesses online.

MA.notes: Imperva Incapsula WAF (visid_incap, incap_ses cookies, x-iinfo header). Requires pre-assigned CID and PIN to file. Not all filings available online. 128-bit encryption required.

MI.notes: Akamai WAF (AkamaiGHost, 403). NEW portal launched June 2025, replacing COFS. Requires MiLogin for Business. Paper forms no longer accepted for annual reports. Shopping cart for multiple filings.

MN.notes: Uses Radware Bot Manager (perfdrive.com validation detected in search results). Requires account creation. PDF uploads supported (<2MB, filename <10 chars). Edge/Chrome/Firefox supported.

MS.portal_name: Mississippi Secretary of State Business Filing
MS.notes: Akamai WAF (akamai-grn header, 403 on curl). Account required for filings. Separate UCC filing system.

MO.notes: Cloudflare WAF (cf-ray, 403 challenge). Online LLC registration via Articles of Org. Expanding online services. For-profit corps save $25 filing online. Pre-fills previous year's data.

MT.portal_name: Montana Secretary of State Business Filing
MT.notes: Cloudflare WAF (cf-ray) but no challenge on basic request (200 OK). 24/7 portal access. Annual reports April 15 deadline. Optimized for Chrome/Edge/Firefox.

NE.notes: Apache server, no WAF detected. Portal fee charged in addition to statutory fees. Frequent Payor Account available for bulk filers. Free business search.

NV.notes: Imperva Incapsula WAF (visid_incap, incap_ses cookies, x-iinfo header). Same-day processing, no additional fees for online. Business license integrated. M-F 8am-5pm customer service.

NH.notes: Returns 403 on curl - bot protection active. Enhanced in 2022. One Click Annual Report feature. Free account required.

NJ.notes: Imperva Incapsula WAF on state.nj.us domain (visid_incap, incap_ses cookies). Under Division of Revenue & Enterprise Services. Premier Business Services (PBS) for multi-service access.

NM.notes: No WAF detected. EXCLUSIVE method for all business filings - no paper option. PDF uploads required for supporting docs. Filing fees non-refundable. Convenience fee on card payments.

NY.portal_name: New York Department of State Online Filing
NY.notes: No WAF detected. Microsoft IIS/7.0. Older ASP.NET 2.0 technology. Handles Certificates of Incorporation and Articles of Organization. Contact: Corporations@dos.ny.gov.

NC.portal_name: North Carolina Secretary of State Business Registration
NC.notes: Cloudflare WAF with challenge (cf-ray, 403). Supports Articles of Incorporation, Organization, Amendment, Dissolution for domestic and foreign entities.

ND.notes: No WAF detected. Custom 'State of North Dakota' server. Requires NDLogin (state SSO) + one-time PIN. Integrated search/filings/annual reports. Standing indicator feature.

OH.notes: Cloudflare WAF with challenge (cf-ray, 403). Handles new registrations, updates, mergers, conversions, consolidations.

OK.portal_name: Oklahoma Secretary of State Business Filing
OK.notes: Cloudflare WAF (cf-ray) but no challenge on basic request (200 OK). $100 + service fee for online registration (~15 min process). Name reservation for 60 days.

OR.notes: No WAF detected. Microsoft IIS/10.0. Supports Edge/Firefox/Chrome. Safari may have issues. Account creation required for filings.

PA.notes: Cloudflare WAF with challenge (cf-ray, 403). New annual report requirement as of 2025 ($7 for most entities, free for nonprofits). Human review still required after online submission.

RI.notes: Cloudflare WAF (cf-ray) but no challenge on basic request (200 OK). RI Business Assistant tool for personalized checklists. Certificate of Good Standing available online.

SC.notes: No WAF detected. Handles new filings, entity changes, certified copies, and certificates of existence.

SD.notes: No WAF detected. Accepts Visa/MC/Discover/Amex. $15 paper filing fee avoided by e-filing. Instant certified copy downloads upon payment. DBA registration available.

TN.portal_name: Tennessee Charity and Business Filing System (TNCaB)
TN.notes: AWS CloudFront (403 on main site). MANDATORY online filing since Oct 2022 - no paper docs accepted. Same-day delivery of processed documents. Must create TNCaB account first.

TX.notes: Cloudflare WAF (cf-ray) + hCaptcha (in CSP header). 24/7 availability. Web filings processed within 24 hours. Assumed Name Certs in 2-3 hours. $1 per search. Fax filing discontinued Sep 2025.

UT.portal_name: Utah Division of Corporations Online Filing
UT.notes: F5 BIG-IP load balancer. Requires UtahID (state SSO). Online filings processed within 48 hours. Under Dept of Commerce, Division of Corporations & Commercial Code.

VT.notes: Imperva Incapsula WAF (visid_incap, incap_ses cookies, x-iinfo header, 403 challenge). Online filing preferred - <1 business day processing, no extra fees.

VA.notes: No WAF detected. Note: VA uses State Corporation Commission, not SOS. CIS = Clerk's Information System. Electronic submissions processed in 1-2 business days.

WA.notes: No WAF detected. $200 online filing (profit), $50 online (nonprofit). Paper = $180. Processing within 5 business days. Expedited available (3 days).

WV.notes: Redirects detected but WAF type unclear. $1 portal fee on all online filings. Mandatory for annual reports since 2019. Multi-agency integration (SOS, Tax, WorkForce, Labor). Expedited available.

WI.notes: No WAF detected. Joint with Dept of Revenue and Workforce Development. WAMS ID recommended. Under Dept of Financial Institutions (not SOS). Direct DFI online options also available.

WY.notes: F5 BIG-IP (TS01ab71c3 cookie). Free certificate of good standing online. Card processing fee for online filings. Annual reports >$500 may not allow e-filing.

easy.description: No WAF, no captcha, standard form submission

medium.description: WAF present but no challenge/captcha on initial request

hard.description: Cloudflare challenge, Akamai blocking, or captcha required
